description: Fashionable floaters for men from lotto, fusing the carefree floater-style sandals with durable and high-duty outsole with lugs. Wear this for casual occasions with denims or cargoes. Upper Fabric upper with rubber lining for forefoot and ankle straps Midfoot and ankle straps have velcro fastening Fabric connector between the forefoot straps and ankle straps Padded rubber footbed with stitch detailing and textured grooves for instep comfort Branding on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs on the forefoot and heel region for grip and traction Herringbone pattern terracing on the midfoot region Impact lines to minimise shock Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
